info.name: Paragon Managed Sync API
info.description:
Managed Sync provides pipelines to sync data from your users' integration sources (File Storage, CRM, Ticketing) into your app or RAG pipeline. The service handles sync scheduling, normalization to standardized schemas, and enforcement of source-system permissions. Managed Sync exposes a Sync API for record ingestion and a Permissions API for ReBAC-style access checks over synced objects.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paragon

request.description: Enables a sync pipeline for a Connected User and integration. Paragon begins fetching records on a configurable schedule.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Returns the state of a sync pipeline for the Connected User.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Downloads the binary content of a file-type synced record. Returns the raw file bytes with the appropriate Content-Type for the source file.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Returns a single normalized synced record by ID.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Returns a paginated list of normalized records for a given integration and sync type (e.g., Files, Contacts, Deals, Tickets).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Checks whether a subject (user, group) has a given relation to a synced object (file, contact, ticket). Useful for enforcing source-system permissions in RAG retrieval.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Performs multiple access checks in a single call.

request.description: Returns the subjects that have access to a given object.

request.description: Expands the relationship tree for a (subject, relation, object) tuple.
